ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "election_officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election officer responsible for the county */,
  "election_website_url" TEXT /* Website URL for county election information */,
  "contact_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for county election office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for county election office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_election_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_officer_id") REFERENCES election_officers ("election_officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "polling_location" TEXT /* Location of the polling place for the precinct */,
  "polling_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the polling location */,
  "polling_location_address" TEXT /* Address of the polling location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., President/Vice President, Governor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the office */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district (e.g., District 1, District 2) */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the district is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., congressional, state legislative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party (e.g., Republican, Democratic) */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the political party (e.g., REP, DEM) */,
  "party_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the party (e.g., red, blue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party the candidate belongs to */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is running for */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the candidate is running in */,
  "running_mate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the running mate (if applicable) */,
  "candidate_website_url" TEXT /* Website URL for the candidate's campaign */,
  "candidate_twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle for the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_running_mate_id FOREIGN KEY ("running_mate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the result is recorded */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "in_person_votes" INTEGER /* Number of in-person votes received by the candidate */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes received by the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., unofficial, official, certified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the state */,
  "state_election_office_url" TEXT /* Website URL for state election office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., 2020 General Election) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the election is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, primary, runoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data entry personnel, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password for secure storage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, verify) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_elections" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "in_person_votes" INTEGER /* Number of in-person votes received by the candidate */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes received by the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year the election took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_elections_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_elections_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_elections_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_elections_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election result being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the audit */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the audit action */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election report */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report (e.g., County-Level Results, State-Level Results) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report contents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_reports_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officers" (
  "election_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election officer */,
  "election_officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the election officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the election officer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the election officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_officer_id")
)
